name: Mine and Dig
author: Poki
description: Mine and Dig is an exciting idle mining game where you dig deep beneath the earth's surface to uncover hidden riches. As an idle miner, you'll strategically manage resources, hire workers, and upgrade equipment to build your mining empire. With addictive gameplay, stunning graphics, and the thrill of becoming a successful mining tycoon, this game offers hours of entertainment for players of all ages. Start your journey, collect valuable resources, and watch your mining empire flourish in this captivating idle drill game. How do I play Mine and Dig? Use your mouse, WASD, or arrow keys to move and interact with the different mining equipment! Who created Mine and Dig? Mine and Dig is created by Sablo Studio. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Mine and Dig for free? You can play Mine and Dig for free on Poki. Can I play Mine and Dig on mobile devices and desktop? Mine and Dig can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
